LONG NAME: SSA_DIB_PRMRY_IMPRMNT_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: 0001–9999 (e.g., 2960,) or null/missing 

COMMENT: These are not ICD-10 (or ICD-9) diagnosis codes. Reference the SSA website: 
https://secure.ssa.gov/poms.nsf/lnx/0426510015 

CMS obtains information regarding SSA disability benefits and stores it as part of the Common 
Medicare Environment (CME) database. 

This field is new starting with MBSF ABCD V2. 
 ^
